intent: Write a 3-source buyer's brief on 'EV-era car accessories for the occasional long-distance driver'. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the electronics and sports-outdoors categories and collect at least 4 relevant accessories (car charger, tire-pressure gauge, portable battery, emergency kit). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/technology AND /f/LifeProTips for community advice on EV road-trip readiness or accessories that are worth packing. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. (3) Wikipedia — open the 'Electric vehicle' article and one relevant subpage ('Charging station' or similar) and extract 3-4 facts about charging logistics or EV limitations. The report must: (a) present storefront picks with stats, (b) justify each pick with Wikipedia-grounded reasoning on EV constraints, (c) incorporate community warnings about specific cheap accessories, (d) close with a 5-item travel kit. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Hard 3-site. EV road-trip accessory kit with tech context.
